_source: structured from spec/SCHOOL_JOURNEYS.md (FROZEN from BRD §06/§11/§03). gen_portal reads this.
_scope_note: scope=school -> filtered to the selected school_id (until auth picks it); scope=public -> open.

journeys.title: Register your school
journeys.desc: Submit your school and coordinator details to get started.

journeys.title: Dashboard
journeys.desc: Your olympiad participations and where each one is in the pipeline.

journeys.title: Upload students
journeys.desc: Build your roster — candidate IDs are assigned automatically.

journeys.title: Validate & finalise
journeys.desc: Review your roster and finalise the count (this locks it).

journeys.title: Payment
journeys.desc: Pay your participation invoice via secure link.

journeys.title: Select exam slot
journeys.desc: Choose a published slot, or propose your own date and time.

journeys.title: Download materials
journeys.desc: Your question papers (4 sets) and named answer sheets — time-gated.

journeys.title: Submit courier
journeys.desc: Return your completed answer sheets to us.

journeys.title: Verify a certificate
journeys.desc: Anyone can check a certificate by its verification code.
